title: schismus calycinus var. marginatus
intro: Schismus calycinus var. marginatus, also known as the hairy grass or schismus, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of schismus calycinus var. marginatus include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and topical applications, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
